---
title: "Sample Application Setup"
format: html
date: last-modified
---

## Phase 3: Miniloan Sample Application Rules

Now that ODM is deployed, we will implement a decision service that externalizes loan approval logic, allowing rules to be updated without redeploying application code. For this example, a sample app called mini loan will be used to demonstrate the process.

### 3.1 Download and Import Sample App Zip File

Download the Miniloan Service.zip and execution-payload.json from the following [repo](https://github.com/DecisionsDev/odm-for-container-getting-started). 

Import Miniloan Service.zip into Decision Center.

### 3.2 Open and Deploy the Miniloan project in Decision Center

### 3.3 Verify in RES
Go to ```bash https://<your-host>/res```

Option A: RES Test UI
```bash
1.  Find the ruleset and select Test
2.  Paste the payload from execution-payload.json
```

Option B: API Call
```bash
curl -k https://<your-host>/DecisionService \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d @execution-payload.json
```

Expect a result like
```json
{
  "approved": true,
  "rate": 5.5
}
```
